eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Faribault, MN; at 11:20 AM on SEP 4, 2019 Effective until 11:50 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test, this is only a test from the Faribault County Sheriff's Office - also Monthly Civil Defense test This is a test
